# LoGG3D-Net: Locally Guided Global Descriptor Learning for 3D Place Recognition

- **Work ID:** `LPR-042`
- **Reviewed version:** `arxiv:2109.08336`
- **Year / venue / type:** 2022 / ICRA / `arxiv_preprint`
- **Curation tier:** `evidence_reviewed`
- **Relevance:** `core_lpr`
- **Primary method:** [Voxel / sparse learning](../landscape.md#branch-learning-based-voxel-sparse)

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI Odometry, MulRan — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–5, § Abstract;III. LoGG3D-Net;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-5;Table I-V
- **input_unit:** single raw LiDAR point cloud with x, y, z and intensity, training preprocessing removes ground and voxelizes at 10 cm — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–5, § Abstract;III. LoGG3D-Net;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-5;Table I-V
- **invariances:** none formally, random yaw augmentation and cross-revisit local consistency provide empirical viewpoint and reverse-loop robustness — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–5, § Abstract;III. LoGG3D-Net;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-5;Table I-V
- **representation:** SparseConv U-Net local point features, local-consistency hardest-contrastive loss, second-order pooling, differentiable eigenvalue power normalization, 256-D global descriptor, quadruplet loss — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–4, § Abstract;III. LoGG3D-Net;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-5;Table I-V
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–6, § Abstract;III. LoGG3D-Net;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-5;Table I-V
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–6, § Abstract;III. LoGG3D-Net;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-5;Table I-V
